description: The property test file at promptnotes/src/lib/feed/__tests__/feedRowEditMode.prop.test.ts imports from 'bun:test' (line 14) but the test infrastructure for this project (as evidenced by vitest.config.ts, the *.vitest.ts naming convention, and the vitest imports in other test files) uses vitest. There is no bunfig.toml or bun test runner configuration visible. The file name feedRowEditMode.prop.test.ts does not match the *.vitest.ts pattern used by other test files (e.g., FeedRow.dom.vitest.ts, feedRowEditMode.vitest.ts). This mismatch means the property tests may never be executed in CI, leaving REQ-003's fast-check property tests un-run.

additionalEvidence.description: Contrast: other test files import from 'vitest' and use *.vitest.ts naming

remediationHint: Either rename the file to feedRowEditMode.prop.vitest.ts and change imports to vitest (if fast-check is compatible), or document in vitest.config.ts that *.prop.test.ts files are excluded from vitest and add a bun test script in package.json.
